name: Cheese and Spinach Borag
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Spinach, blanched, drained, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the blanched spinach, Monterey Jack cheese, cream cheese, first beaten egg, parsley, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
2. Place two sheets of phyllo dough on a buttered flat baking pan. Brush with melted butter. Repeat with additional sheets until half of the phyllo dough is used. Spread the cheese-spinach mixture evenly over the phyllo layers.
3. Place two more sheets of phyllo dough on top and brush with melted butter. Continue layering with phyllo and butter until all sheets are used.
4. Carefully slice the layers into squares.
5. In a small bowl, mix the milk and second egg until well combined.
6. Generously brush the mixture over the squares.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
